title: Wet Backapacks
description: A Backpacked addon, adding many different backpacks with their own themes and challenges to unlock!
body:
A Backpack Addon for the mod Backpacked, adding more than 5 new decorative backpacks, each with its own unique challenges for you to accomplish and attain.
Take your adventures to the next level with a collection of visually distinct backpacks designed to complement your style. Each backpack comes with its own set of unique challenges to complete, rewarding you as you progress through the game. Whether you're looking to stand out or simply enjoy a fresh set of goals, this addon offers a clean and polished expansion to the Backpacked mod experience.
Requires the Backpacked mod to function.
